notes: Fun fact: About a third of the Netherlands sits below sea level. The Dutch did not just adapt to water; they engineered their way out of it. The entire country is a masterclass in infrastructure stubbornness.
highlights: Liked: The cycling infrastructure is world-class. Bikes have genuine priority over cars. The whole country is designed around human-scale movement.
Did not like: The weather is relentlessly gray. Sunshine feels like an event rather than a daily occurrence.
